channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Uttarakhand High Court Denies Relief to Deepak Kumar, Imposes Restrictions on Social Media Use
item.description: The Uttarakhand High Court on Friday denied relief to Deepak Kumar, a gym owner from Kotdwar, who is also known as ‘Mohammed’ Deepak. The court directed him not to post on social media regarding the o...

item.title: Single mother’s journey to educate her disabled son despite numerous challenges
item.description: Paskazia Yohana’s life in Mjesani Village, Mkinga District, Tanga Region, stands as a powerful story of resilience and determination. Facing the odds of raising her disabled son, Jonathan Kilenga, wit...

item.title: Drunk driving suspect arrested after fatal head-on crash with scholar transport vehicle in Ekurhuleni
item.description: A tragic incident occurred on Friday morning on Olifantsfontein Road in Ekurhuleni, where a suspected drunk driver caused a head-on collision that claimed the lives of a young schoolgirl and her drive...

item.title: Chuck Norris, Iconic Action Star, Passes Away at 87, Family Confirms
item.description: Renowned action movie icon Chuck Norris has passed away, according to a statement released by his family. The legendary actor, martial artist, and pop culture figure was widely celebrated for his role...

item.title: One Nation’s Rise Signals Growing Discontent with the Major Parties
item.description: The editorial from *The Nightly* examines how the upcoming South Australian state election could reshape the conservative political landscape and mark a turning point for One Nation. Polls suggest tha...

item.title: Exploring Female Desire and Agency in the Canadian-Greek Film Maya & Samar
item.description: Maya & Samar is a Canadian-Greek drama exploring female sexuality, freedom, and agency. The story follows Maya, a free-spirited journalist from Toronto, who encounters Samar, an Afghan Muslim undocume...

item.title: UN and South Sudan Human Rights Commission Honour Late South African Diplomat Nicholas Haysom
item.description: The United Nations Commission on Human Rights in South Sudan has paid heartfelt tribute to Nicholas “Fink” Haysom, the South African diplomat and UN envoy who passed away in New York City on 19 March ...

item.title: PM Shehbaz holds talks with regional leaders, urges peaceful resolution to Middle East conflict
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif engaged in diplomatic consultations with the leaders of Azerbaijan, Malaysia, Uzbekistan, and Egypt on Friday, emphasising the urgent need to de-escalate tensions amid th...

item.title: Hollywood Martial Arts Legend Chuck Norris Passes Away Peacefully at 86
item.description: American martial artist and Hollywood legend Chuck Norris don die at the age of 86, according to wetin him family talk for one statement wey dem post for Instagram on Friday. Dem say im die suddenly f...

item.title: Actor and martial artist Chuck Norris dies at 86 after decades of shaping action cinema
item.description: Chuck Norris, the American martial artist, actor, and cultural icon best known for his role as Cordell Walker in the long-running TV series 'Walker, Texas Ranger,' has passed away at the age of 86. Ac...

item.title: 26 Filipinos in 4th Batch of Repatriates Return from Israel Amid Ongoing Conflict
item.description: The Department of Migrant Workers (DMW) has confirmed the return of a fourth batch of Filipinos from Israel amid the ongoing Middle Eastern conflict. This batch consists of 22 Overseas Filipino Worker...

item.title: Displaced Lebanese Struggle to Celebrate Eid Amid War and Loss
item.description: The Eidul Fitr celebrations in Lebanon this year have been overshadowed by the ongoing war that began with the US and Israel launching strikes on Iran. The regional conflict has drawn Lebanon into the...

item.title: Ramazan Iftar Timings Announced for Major Pakistani Cities
item.description: As Ramazan draws to a close, Dawn has released the official Iftar timings for the final days of fasting across Pakistan’s main cities. The timings, based on both Fiqh-i-Hanafia and Fiqh-i-Jaafria scho...

item.title: Women Leaders Discuss AI, Technology, and Financial Growth at Dar Summit
item.description: In Dar es Salaam, the Accelerate Women Executive Summit 2026 gathered women leaders, entrepreneurs, policymakers, and professionals to explore technology, AI, and financial growth opportunities. Under...

item.title: India sends 2.5‑ton medical aid to Kabul after Pakistani airstrike on Afghan drug‑rehab hospital
item.description: India has sent a 2.5‑ton consignment of medical aid to Kabul in the wake of a deadly Pakistani airstrike on a large drug‑rehabilitation hospital in the Afghan capital. The airstrike, which hit the fac...

item.title: How Pierre Poilievre’s Joe Rogan appearance advanced Canada’s case in the United States
item.description: In this opinion piece, Ben Woodfinden argues that Conservative leader Pierre Poilievre’s appearance on Joe Rogan’s podcast in Austin, Texas, was a strategic and effective way of advocating for Canadia...

item.title: US, Germany, and Canada take down massive global botnet networks infecting over 3 million devices
item.description: The United States Department of Justice announced on March 19, 2026, that it had cooperated with Germany and Canada to dismantle four major botnets — Aisuru, KimWolf, JackSkid, and Mossad — that infec...

item.title: Two individuals arrested after attempting unauthorised entry at Faslane naval base
item.description: A 34-year-old Iranian man and a 31-year-old woman have been arrested at HM Naval Base Clyde, near Helensburgh, Argyll and Bute, after attempting to gain access to the UK's nuclear-armed submarines. Po...

item.title: Reichel Impresses with Goal and Assist in Bruins' Dominant 6-1 Win Over Jets
item.description: In his debut game with the Boston Bruins, prospect Reichel made an immediate impact, scoring one goal and contributing an assist in a dominant 6-1 victory over the Winnipeg Jets. The game saw a stando...

item.title: Nyong'o Calls Kisumu Residents to Witness SGR Launch, Highlights Regional Benefits
item.description: Kisumu Governor Prof. Anyang' Nyong'o has appealed to Kisumu residents to come out in large numbers for the launch of the Standard Gauge Railway (SGR) extension from Naivasha to Kisumu by President Wi...
